notes: Current round input built from existing repository logs. Semantic judge scores can be added later under each candidate's judge_scores object.

candidates.name: AutoResearchClaw
candidates.idea_text: Use retriever-provided relevance scores to guide layerwise sparse and dense attention allocation in RAG systems for better efficiency-accuracy tradeoffs.

candidates.name: Dr. Claw
candidates.idea_text: Build a process reward model with explicit epistemic status typing so scientific reasoning can distinguish known facts, false claims, and novel unknowns during test-time search.

candidates.name: AI-SCIENTIST-V2
candidates.idea_text: Treat test-time compute as an experimental budget and allocate it adaptively to high-information reasoning steps in open-domain scientific discovery.
